DO YOU GET IT!?

posts.text:
There’s a difference between bringing a bill to the floor and whipping the votes. 

Standing filibuster or bust.


Leader John Thune (@LeaderJohnThune)

Next week, I will bring the SAVE America Act to the floor. Senate Democrats will be forced to defend their outrageous positions on these issues and explain to the American people why common sense and the Democrat Party have parted ways.

posts.text:
95% of the 22,000+ voters agree this TORTURE needs to end!

For the 5% who “trust Congress” and want to keep this time-change nonsense going…

I’ll further prove my point with an extra TWO hours of sleep tonight when I set my clock back! 😘✌️


Lauren Boebert (@laurenboebert)

Should this be the LAST time we set our clocks back like an annual hazing ritual?
Community note: The change to daylight savings time requires the clock to be set forward in the spring, not back. 

nist.gov/pml/time-and-f…
